reference: I have a lot of pimple scars. How can I get rid of them? I have been having many pimples since my teenage years. They used to be large, pus-filled ones. I used to pick at the pimples, and now, as a result, I am left with many scars on my face. I have tried all kinds of creams and lotions. I have used many masks on my face, but the scars are still prominent.
